SEARCH
Package com.unimib.assignment3.service

Class TeamService

java.lang.Object
com.unimib.assignment3.service.TeamService
@Service public class TeamService extends Object
Service class for managing Team entities.

This class provides methods to create, save, delete, and manage teams, including adding/removing employees and tasks, and setting/getting supervisors. It also includes repository functions to retrieve teams based on various criteria.

    • TeamService

      public TeamService()

  • Method Details

    • createTeam

      @Transactional public Team createTeam(Supervisor supervisor)
      Create a new Team with the given Supervisor.
      Parameters:
      supervisor - the supervisor of the new team
      Returns:
      the created Team entity
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the supervisor is null

    • createTeam

      @Transactional public Team createTeam(List<Employee> employees, Supervisor supervisor)
      Create a new Team with the given employees and Supervisor.
      Parameters:
      employees - employees of the new team
      supervisor - the supervisor of the new team
      Returns:
      the created Team entity
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the list of employees is empty or the supervisor is null

    • createTeam

      @Transactional public Team createTeam(List<Employee> employees, Supervisor supervisor, List<Task> tasks)
      Create a new Team with the given employees, Supervisor, tasks.
      Parameters:
      employees - employees of the new team
      supervisor - the supervisor of the new team
      tasks - tasks of the new team
      Returns:
      the created Team entity
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the list of employees or tasks is empty, or the supervisor is null

    • saveTeam

      public Team saveTeam(Team team)
      Save the given Team entity.
      Parameters:
      team - the Team entity to be saved
      Returns:
      the saved Team entity
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the Team entity is null

    • deleteTeam

      @Transactional public void deleteTeam(Team team)
      Delete the given Team entity and all its associations with employees, supervisor and tasks.
      Parameters:
      team - the Team entity to be deleted
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the Team entity is null

    • getEmployeesInTeam

      public List<Employee> getEmployeesInTeam(Team team)
      Get the list of employees in the given Team.
      Parameters:
      team - the Team
      Returns:
      the list of employees in the Team
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the Team is null

    • addEmployeeToTeam

      @Transactional public void addEmployeeToTeam(Team newTeam, Employee employee)
      Add the given employee to the given Team removing him from any other Team he was in.
      Parameters:
      newTeam - the Team to which the employee will be added
      employee - the employee to be added
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the Team or employee is null

    • removeAllEmployeesFromTeam

      @Transactional public void removeAllEmployeesFromTeam(Team team)
      Remove all employees from the given Team.
      Parameters:
      team - the Team from which employees will be removed
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the Team is null

    • removeEmployeeFromTeam

      @Transactional public void removeEmployeeFromTeam(Team team, Employee employee)
      Remove the given employee from the given Team.
      Parameters:
      team - the Team from which the employee will be removed
      employee - the employee to be removed
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the Team or employee is null, or if the employee is not found in the Team

    • getTeamSupervisor

      public Supervisor getTeamSupervisor(Team team)
      Get the supervisor of the given Team.
      Parameters:
      team - the Team from which the supervisor will be retrieved
      Returns:
      the supervisor of the Team
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the Team is null

      public List<Task> getTeamTasks(Team team)
      Get the list of tasks assigned to the given Team.
      Parameters:
      team - the Team from which the tasks will be retrieved
      Returns:
      the list of tasks assigned to the Team
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the Team is null

    • addTaskToTeam

      @Transactional public void addTaskToTeam(Team newTeam, Task task)
      Add the given task to the given Team removing it from any other Team it was in.
      Parameters:
      newTeam - the Team to which the task will be added
      task - the task to be added
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the Team or task is null

    • removeAllTasksFromTeam

      @Transactional public void removeAllTasksFromTeam(Team team)
      Remove all tasks from the given Team.
      Parameters:
      team - the Team from which tasks will be removed
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the Team is null

    • removeTaskFromTeam

      @Transactional public void removeTaskFromTeam(Team team, Task task)
      Remove the given task from the given Team.
      Parameters:
      team - the Team from which the task will be removed
      task - the task to be removed
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the Team or task is null, or if the task is not found in the Team

      public Optional<Team> getTeamById(Long id)
      Get a Team by its id.
      Parameters:
      id - the id of the Team to retrieve
      Returns:
      the Team with the given id, or empty if not found

      Delete a Team by its id.
      Parameters:
      id - the id of the Team to delete
      Throws:

      Parameters:
      supervisorId - the id of the supervisor to retrieve teams from
      Returns:
      a list of all Teams by supervisor id
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the supervisor with the given id is not found

    • getTeamByEmployeesPersonId

      public Team getTeamByEmployeesPersonId(Long employeeId)
      Get a Team by employee id.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the id of the employee to retrieve team from
      Returns:
      the Team the employee belongs to, or empty if not found
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the employee with the given id is not found

    • getTeamByTaskId

      public Team getTeamByTaskId(Long taskId)
      Get a Team by task id.
      Parameters:
      taskId - the id of the task to retrieve team from
      Returns:
      the Team the task belongs to, or empty if not found
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the task with the given id is not found

    • getTasksByTeamId

      public List<Task> getTasksByTeamId(Long teamId)
      Get all tasks by team id.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the id of the team to retrieve tasks from
      Returns:
      a list of all tasks by team id
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the team with the given id is not found

    • getSupervisorByTeamId

      public Supervisor getSupervisorByTeamId(Long teamId)
      Get the supervisor of a team by its id.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the id of the team to retrieve supervisor from
      Returns:
      the supervisor of the team, or empty if not found
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the team with the given id is not found

    • getEmployeesByTeamId

      public List<Employee> getEmployeesByTeamId(Long teamId)
      Get all employees by team id.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the id of the team to retrieve employees from
      Returns:
      a list of all employees by team id
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the team with the given id is not found

    • getTasksInTeamIdByTaskState

      public List<Task> getTasksInTeamIdByTaskState(Long teamId, TaskState taskState)
      Get all tasks in a team by task state.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the id of the team to retrieve tasks from
      taskState - the state of the tasks to retrieve
      Returns:
      a list of all tasks in the team with the given state
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the team with the given id is not found, or if the task state is null

    • getEmployeesInTeamIdWithSalaryGreaterThan

      public List<Employee> getEmployeesInTeamIdWithSalaryGreaterThan(Long teamId, double salary)
      Get employees in a team with the salary greater than a given value.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the id of the team to retrieve employees from
      salary - the minimum salary of the employees to retrieve
      Returns:
      a list of employees in the team with a salary greater than the given value
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the team with the given id is not found, or if the salary is negative

    • getEmployeesInTeamIdWithSalaryLessThan

      public List<Employee> getEmployeesInTeamIdWithSalaryLessThan(Long teamId, double salary)
      Get employees in a team with the salary less than a given value.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the id of the team to retrieve employees from
      salary - the maximum salary of the employees to retrieve
      Returns:
      a list of employees in the team with a salary less than the given value
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the team with the given id is not found, or if the salary is negative

    • getEmployeesInTeamIdWithEmployeeRole

      public List<Employee> getEmployeesInTeamIdWithEmployeeRole(Long teamId, EmployeeRole employeeRole)
      Get employees in a team with a given employee role.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the id of the team to retrieve employees from
      employeeRole - the role of the employees to retrieve
      Returns:
      a list of employees in the team with the given role
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the team with the given id is not found, or if the employee role is null

      public void checkEmployeeId(Long id)
      Check if a given employee id is null.
      Parameters:
      id - the employee id to check

      public void checkTaskId(Long id)
      Check if a given task id is null.
      Parameters:
      id - the task id to check
